prompt: I want to add notifications to my app so users know when something happens
assertions: The transcript shows at least 2 clarifying questions were asked before the spec was written
The spec contains a 'What We Are NOT Solving' section with at least one item
The spec contains an Interfaces section that names at least one schema or contract
The spec does not prescribe specific implementation technologies (e.g. no specific gems, queue systems, or libraries recommended)
